core.name: Core
core.tagline: Everything you need to run a fair, structured pocket money system.

summary_groups.label: Chores & Ledger
summary_groups.detail: SHA-256 immutable ledger, 64 built-in chores, streak awards, flash chores & photo proof

summary_groups.label: Goals & Money
summary_groups.detail: Savings Grove goals, Rate Guide benchmarking, payment bridge & overdraft facility

summary_groups.label: Family & Access
summary_groups.detail: Unlimited children, 6-digit child codes, multi-household compatible & avatar personalisation

groups.label: Family & Access
items: No child data required for use

core_ai.name: Core AI
core_ai.tagline: See how your child is growing — not just what they've earned.

items.title: Parent Insights AI
items.desc: Weekly AI brief on your child's consistency, earning velocity, and savings behaviour — with trend deltas vs the week before.

items.title: AI Mentor coaching
items.desc: Personalised financial coaching for your child, triggered by their real chore and earnings data. Not generic advice — context it actually knows.

items.title: Learning Lab
items.desc: 25-module financial literacy curriculum covering budgeting, saving, and smart spending — sequenced to your child's age and progress.

shield_ai.name: Shield AI
shield_ai.tagline: For separated and co-parenting families who need a record that holds up.

items.title: Tamper-evident PDF exports
items.desc: Cryptographically sealed records, accepted by UK family courts and solicitors. Each export carries a SHA-256 hash proving it hasn't been altered.

items.title: Court-ready audit export
items.desc: Complete chronological history of every transaction, approval, and chore — formatted to documentary evidence standards.

items.title: Co-parent verified sharing
items.desc: Separate logins for both households. Each parent sees what they need; neither can edit the other's view of the record.

items.title: Ledger seal & verification
items.desc: A QR-verifiable seal on every export so a mediator, solicitor, or judge can confirm authenticity without specialist tools.
